data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. PATRIOT BURST is a smart dog who hit the ground running and led throughout to score an effortless win (25.82) at Warragul in Maiden over 460m. Superior out of the boxes and will be in the firing line early. The form out of last race has been strong. Can continue the winning form. 2. SONG ABOUT SUSAN scored (25.80) last time out over 450m at Shepparton three-and-a-half months ago. Has a good overall strike-rate and can find the frame here. 8. IN MODERATION opened his account last time out by 0.9 lengths at The Meadows over 525m (30.65). Will break from a wide draw. Must include in calculations. 1. ASTON KRISTEN placed last time (26.40) at Warragul in a Mix 6/7, finishing second and beaten 4.5 lengths. Has two wins already from this draw.","runners":[5,2,8,1],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: HEALESVILLE-R5-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
